detail.description:
Raising an Assassin: Newly Open!

The perfect harmony of dot action and idle RPG! Become a legend through secret, deadly combat.

The essence of an idle RPG that you can enjoy even in your busy daily life!
“Raising an Assassin” is a game where dot action and idle RPG meet, allowing you to experience cool battles and constant growth. Defeat enemies in various battlefields and become an assassin who goes beyond your limits!

◎ Experience unstoppable growth!
